title: AI-900 & AI-901-Microsoft Azure AI Fundamental Certification
description: Comprehensive preparation course for both the AI-900 (retiring June 2026) and new AI-901 Azure AI Fundamentals exams. Covers core AI concepts, responsible AI principles, machine learning, computer vision, NLP, generative AI, and hands-on labs using Microsoft Foundry and Azure AI services.

sections.title: AI-901 - Identify AI concepts and capabilities
AI-901 - Implement AI solutions - Microsoft Foundry
AI-901 - Implement AI solutions - Azure AI Services
AI-900 - Introduction and basics on Azure
AI-900 - Describe AI workloads and considerations
AI-900 - Describe fundamental principles of machine learning on Azure
AI-900 - Describe features of computer vision workloads on Azure
AI-900 - Describe features of Natural Language Processing and Conversational AI
AI-900 - Describe features of generative AI workloads on Azure
